quality.rationale: 纯张量代数对称性证明，无具体度规与物理场景，但逻辑严密、结构通用性强

origin.question:
Problem 3.15. Let $\mathbf{A}_{\mu 
u}$ be an antisymmetric tensor so that $\mathbf{A}_{\mu 
u} = -\mathbf{A}_{
u \mu}$ ; and let $\mathbf{S}^{\mu 
u}$ be a symmetric tensor so that $\mathbf{S}^{\mu 
u} = \mathbf{S}^{
u \mu}$ . Show that $\mathbf{A}_{\mu 
u} \mathbf{S}^{\mu 
u} = 0$ . Establish the following two identities for any arbitrary tensor $\mathbf{V}_{\mu 
u}$ :$$\mathrm {V}^{\mu 
u} \mathrm {A}_{\mu 
u} =  rac {1}{2} \left(\mathrm {V}^{\mu 
u} - \mathrm {V}^{
u \mu}ight) \mathrm {A}_{\mu 
u}, \qquad \mathrm {V}^{\mu 
u} \mathrm {S}_{\mu 
u} =  rac {1}{2} \left(\mathrm {V}^{\mu 
u} + \mathrm {V}^{
u \mu}ight) \mathrm {S}_{\mu 
u}.$$
origin.solution:
Solution 3.15. By the given symmetries $\mathbf{A}_{\mu 
u} \mathbf{S}^{\mu 
u} = -\mathbf{A}_{
u \mu} \mathbf{S}^{
u \mu}$ , but $\mu, 
u$ are dummy indices so we can interchange $\mu$ and $
u$ to get$$\mathbf {A}_{\mu 
u} \mathbf {S}^{\mu 
u} = - \mathbf {A}_{
u \mu} \mathbf {S}^{\mu 
u} = - \mathbf {A}_{\mu 
u} \mathbf {S}^{\mu 
u}.$$Thus $\mathbf{A}_{\mu 
u} \mathbf{S}^{\mu 
u} = 0$ .Any tensor $\mathbf{V}_{\mu 
u}$ can be written as a sum of its symmetric part $	ilde{\mathbf{V}}_{\mu 
u} \equiv  rac{1}{2} (\mathbf{V}_{\mu 
u} + \mathbf{V}_{
u \mu})$ and its antisymmetric part $	ilde{\mathbf{V}}_{\mu 
u} \equiv  rac{1}{2} (\mathbf{V}_{\mu 
u} - \mathbf{V}_{
u \mu})$ , thus$$\mathbf {V}^{\mu 
u} \mathbf {A}_{\mu 
u} = 	ilde {\mathbf {V}}^{\mu 
u} \mathbf {A}_{\mu 
u} + 	ilde { ar {\mathbf {V}}}^{\mu 
u} \mathbf {A}_{\mu 
u} = 	ilde { ar {\mathbf {V}}}^{\mu 
u} \mathbf {A}_{\mu 
u} =  rac {1}{2} (\mathbf {V}^{\mu 
u} - \mathbf {V}^{
u \mu}) \mathbf {A}_{\mu 
u}$$$$\mathrm {V}^{\mu 
u} \mathrm {S}_{\mu 
u} = 	ilde {\mathrm {V}}^{\mu 
u} \mathrm {S}_{\mu 
u} + 	ilde { ar {\mathrm {V}}}^{\mu 
u} \mathrm {S}_{\mu 
u} = 	ilde {\mathrm {V}}^{\mu 
u} \mathrm {S}_{\mu 
u} =  rac {1}{2} (\mathrm {V}^{\mu 
u} + \mathrm {V}^{
u \mu}) \mathrm {S}_{\mu 
u}.$$
